tools.name: deploy_edge_ai_deployment
tools.description: Deploy Edge AI — package models into containers, configure IoT Edge modules, set up fleet deployment with canary rollouts, layered deployments, offline-capable. Use when: deploy, provision edge fleet.

tools.name: evaluate_edge_ai_deployment
tools.description: Evaluate Edge AI Deployment — measure fleet deployment success, device compatibility, rollout health, offline resilience, rollback capability. Use when: evaluate, test fleet deployment.

tools.name: tune_edge_ai_deployment
tools.description: Tune Edge AI Deployment — optimize container image size, rollout speed, update frequency, fleet segmentation, monitoring granularity, deployment cost. Use when: tune, optimize fleet ops.
